name: dc-hub-intelligence
title: DC Hub Intelligence
summary: Data center intelligence for AI agents — 21k facilities, 10 ISO grids, M&A, fiber, hyperscaler deals.
description_long: DC Hub is the authoritative data layer for global data center infrastructure. AI agents can query 21,000+ facilities, 1,941+ M&A deals, real-time grid intelligence across 10 ISOs (7 US + Hydro-Quebec + AESO + Nord Pool), fiber routes, water/climate risk, tax incentives. Two relevance tools you can't find elsewhere: AI Compute Capacity Index (ranks markets by where 100MW of AI training can land in 30/60/90 days) and Hyperscaler Deal Tracker (live Stargate/Oracle/CoreWeave/AMD ticker).
